svg.title: HaulWell™ Driver Readiness Operating System architecture
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture showing entry points flowing through assessment, zone placement, support tools, coaching programs, and long-term readiness outcomes.

g.text: 25 items → score → zone placement → signal profile
90-day reassessment · ongoing AI Coach · career sustainability
